intent: Coordinated player-feedback language for brassworks UI plates, enamel lamps, gauge motion, and readable combat/system confirmation.
sprite_import_notes: Import icons as Sprite (2D and UI), alpha is transparency, 256 px source size.
Point-filter is acceptable for icon proof, final UI should use bilinear and atlas compression matched to the HUD.
Use cream icon shapes plus amber/green/red signal fills so color is supportive, not sole meaning.
hud_language: Brass plates anchor event class; blackened iron backers carry contrast; cream labels carry text.
Amber is attention/pending/impact, green is success/route/acquired, red is denied/danger/empty.
Gauge needle motion should overshoot 6-10 degrees then settle within 0.12-0.22 seconds.

cues.ui: micro crosshair bloom, brass tick ring, 0.07s flash
cues.vfx: 2-3 pressure sparks, tiny steam puff, decal glint; world-space only
cues.audio: short brass ping plus softened metal tick; -13 LUFS short cue target
cues.mix: high-mid transient, below weapon fire, sidechain ducked by gunshot bus
cues.accessibility: shape + timing must carry confirmation without relying on amber alone

cues.ui: thin gauge needle nudge at reticle edge, 0.10s
cues.vfx: small amber enamel chip, weak-point lamp flicker if valid target
cues.audio: soft ratchet click with body-material layer hook
cues.accessibility: do not strobe; hit state also uses enemy flinch/sparks

cues.ui: reticle settles to route-green check notch, 0.18s
cues.vfx: shutdown steam sigh, amber lamp collapse to dark, brass fragments sparkle once
cues.audio: valve drop, low metal clonk, steam release tail
cues.mix: one-shot emphasis, protected from crowd hit spam for 0.25s
cues.accessibility: clear silhouette drop plus non-red success color

cues.ui: brass inventory plate slides in/out, icon lamp fill
cues.vfx: small intake swirl toward player, green enamel glint at pickup origin
cues.audio: positive valve tick, soft gauge rise, tiny steam inhale
cues.mix: front UI bus, duck ambience by 1 dB for 0.12s
cues.accessibility: icon and text token support for colorblind readability

cues.ui: large brass nameplate with hidden cog iris, 1.2s minimum read
cues.vfx: green route lamps chase once, dust/steam reveal puff
cues.audio: warm three-note chime through brass resonator, no jump scare
cues.mix: music-compatible, never masks enemy threat callouts
cues.accessibility: caption-safe label, longer hold, no required rapid flashing

cues.ui: objective brass ledger tab stamps in with needle sweep
cues.vfx: none by default; optional world marker pressure lamp pulse
cues.audio: paper/plate stamp plus quiet gauge tick
cues.mix: UI bus with narrow transient; avoid competing with pickup confirm
cues.accessibility: text contrast 7:1 target on dark iron backing

cues.ui: red enamel lock tab shakes once, no repeated screen shake
cues.vfx: small red pressure spark at interact point, valve refuses half-turn
cues.audio: dry clack + blocked steam chirp; short, non-punishing
cues.mix: low volume but sharp attack; throttle repeat to 0.35s
cues.accessibility: must include lock icon silhouette, not red-only language

cues.ui: green enamel arrow lamp sweeps along route plate
cues.vfx: world route lamps chase away from player once
cues.audio: valve opens, soft pressure rise, two light ticks
cues.mix: spatialized if world-sourced, UI layer if compass-sourced
cues.accessibility: animated direction and arrow shape carry meaning without color

cues.ui: dark iron panel, brass section headers, cream text, focus lamp rail
cues.vfx: none; keep menus calm and legible
cues.audio: soft mechanical focus ticks, no looping hiss under settings
cues.mix: UI ticks -18 LUFS, respect menu SFX slider
cues.accessibility: minimum 18px body equivalent, high contrast, reduced motion path

cues.ui: red pressure gasket edge vignette, heart gauge needle tremble
cues.vfx: rare steam cough from player rig, never opaque center screen
cues.audio: muffled pressure thump at restrained cadence
cues.mix: heartbeat-style cue capped and disabled in pause/settings
cues.accessibility: reduced-motion swaps pulse for static cracked gauge + audio toggle

cues.ui: ammo cartridge icon drains to amber, final shots show red rim
cues.vfx: weapon gauge needle dips, tiny chamber sputter on dry threshold
cues.audio: hollow cartridge rattle, last-round click accent
cues.mix: weapon-adjacent, less urgent than health, no constant loop
cues.accessibility: numeric ammo remains primary; color only reinforces state
